languages.text:
Until the end of combat, Pasqal's allies also interact with their own {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Pain-Seeker{/g} cells. While outside them, they're considered {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Suffering{/g}, too.
Pasqal's maximum Wounds are lowered by 80%.

traits.locale_text:
Until the end of combat, Pasqal's allies also interact with their own {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Pain-Seeker{/g} cells. While outside them, they're considered {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Suffering{/g}, too.
Pasqal's maximum Wounds are lowered by 80%.

languages.text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, Pasqal's allies also interact with their own {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Pain-Seeker{/g} cells. While outside them, they're considered {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Suffering{/g}, too.
Pasqal's maximum Wounds are lowered by 80%.

traits.locale_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's turn, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony-probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's turn, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

languages.text: До конца боя все союзные персонажи получают этот эффект. В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} союзника вокруг него также подсвечиваются клетки. Пока союзник стоит на одной из них, на него действует эффект {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}изыскатель страдания{/g}. Пока он стоит не на подсвеченной клетке, на него вместо этого действует эффект {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}утраченное сопряжение{/g}.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: До конца боя все союзные персонажи получают этот эффект. В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} союзника вокруг него также подсвечиваются клетки. Пока союзник стоит на одной из них, на него действует эффект {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}изыскатель страдания{/g}. Пока он стоит не на подсвеченной клетке, на него вместо этого действует эффект {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}утраченное сопряжение{/g}.

До конца боя все союзные персонажи получают этот эффект. В начале {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} союзника вокруг него также подсвечиваются клетки. Пока союзник стоит на одной из них, на него действует эффект {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}изыскатель страдания{/g}. Пока он стоит не на подсвеченной клетке, на него вместо этого действует эффект {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}утраченное сопряжение{/g}.

languages.text: Tous les personnages alliés bénéficient de cet effet jusqu'à la fin du combat. Au début du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} d'un allié, des cases sont également mises en évidence à son intention. Lorsqu'il se trouve sur l'une de ces cases, il bénéficie de l'effet {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Sonde d'agonie neuronale{/g}. Lorsqu'il se trouve en dehors, il subit {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Interface déconnectée{/g}.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Tous les personnages alliés bénéficient de cet effet jusqu'à la fin du combat. Au début du {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} d'un allié, des cases sont également mises en évidence à son intention. Lorsqu'il se trouve sur l'une de ces cases, il bénéficie de l'effet {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Sonde d'agonie neuronale{/g}. Lorsqu'il se trouve en dehors, il subit {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Interface déconnectée{/g}.

languages.text: Tüm dost karakterler bu etkiyi kazanır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Bir dost birimin {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında hücreler onun için de vurgulu gösterilir. Bir dost birim, bu hücrelerden birinde durduğunda {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sinirsel ızdırap sondasından{/g} etkilenir. Bu hücrelerde değilken ise {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}kopuk arayüzden{/g} etkilenir.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Tüm dost karakterler bu etkiyi kazanır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Bir dost birimin {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında hücreler onun için de vurgulu gösterilir. Bir dost birim, bu hücrelerden birinde durduğunda {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sinirsel ızdırap sondasından{/g} etkilenir. Bu hücrelerde değilken ise {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}kopuk arayüzden{/g} etkilenir.

languages.text: 全体盟友获得此效果，直至战斗结束。盟友{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，也对其高亮显示格子。盟友站在其中1个高亮格子上时，受到{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神经痛苦探针{/g}影响。若不在这些格子上，受到{g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}接口断开{/g}影响。
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 全体盟友获得此效果，直至战斗结束。盟友{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，也对其高亮显示格子。盟友站在其中1个高亮格子上时，受到{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神经痛苦探针{/g}影响。若不在这些格子上，受到{g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}接口断开{/g}影响。

languages.text: Hasta el final del combate, todos los personajes aliados reciben este efecto. Al comienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de un aliado, también se resaltan casillas para ese aliado. Mientras un aliado se encuentre en una de estas casillas, se verá afectado por la {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sonda de agonía neural{/g}. Mientras no esté en ninguna de ellas, se verá afectado por {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}interfaz perdida{/g}.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el final del combate, todos los personajes aliados reciben este efecto. Al comienzo del {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} de un aliado, también se resaltan casillas para ese aliado. Mientras un aliado se encuentre en una de estas casillas, se verá afectado por la {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}sonda de agonía neural{/g}. Mientras no esté en ninguna de ellas, se verá afectado por {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}interfaz perdida{/g}.

languages.text: Bis zum Ende des Kampfes erhalten diesen Effekt alle verbündeten Charaktere. Zu Beginn des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} eines Verbündeten werden Felder auch für sie markiert. Steht ein Verbündeter auf einem dieser Felder, wird er mit {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Neurale Schmerzsonde{/g} belegt. Steht er auf keinem der Felder, wird er mit {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Getrennte Schnittstelle{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Bis zum Ende des Kampfes erhalten diesen Effekt alle verbündeten Charaktere. Zu Beginn des {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} eines Verbündeten werden Felder auch für sie markiert. Steht ein Verbündeter auf einem dieser Felder, wird er mit {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}Neurale Schmerzsonde{/g} belegt. Steht er auf keinem der Felder, wird er mit {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}Getrennte Schnittstelle{/g} belegt.

languages.text: 戦闘終了まで、すべての味方キャラクターがこの効果を得る。味方の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時、その味方にもマスが強調表示される。味方がそれらのマスのいずれかに立っている間、{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神経苦痛プローブ{/g}の影響を受ける。立っていない間は、{g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}切断されたインターフェース{/g}の影響を受ける。
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, all allied characters gain this effect. At the start of an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, cells are also highlighted for them. While an ally stands on one of those cells, they are affected by {g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}neural agony probe{/g}. While not standing on them, they are affected by {g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}severed interface{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 戦闘終了まで、すべての味方キャラクターがこの効果を得る。味方の{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時、その味方にもマスが強調表示される。味方がそれらのマスのいずれかに立っている間、{g|f:affa20abaee0491b8b1bec789d6a3809}神経苦痛プローブ{/g}の影響を受ける。立っていない間は、{g|f:f24d26752b6f47cfb35f177b4358c247}切断されたインターフェース{/g}の影響を受ける。
